mapper.insert:
insert into notice
title, content, publisher_id, publish_time, target_type, target_id, target_name, status, create_time
values
#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{publishTime}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, '发布', now()
mapper.select: select n.id, n.title, n.content, n.publisher_id, t.name as publisher_name, n.publish_time, n.target_type, n.target_id, n.target_name, n.status, n.create_time, n.update_time from notice n left join teacher t on n.publisher_id = t.id where n.id = #{id}
